sentiment.reasoning: Class action litigation introduces significant legal and financial risk, creating immediate negative sentiment.

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries recalls products in supply chain optimization line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: Product recalls due to quality concerns damage brand reputation and incur immediate operational costs.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
